broken-arm-nebula.name: Broken Arm Nebula
broken-arm-nebula.description: Largest nebula in the galaxy that also happens to have the lowest stellar density.

brighton.name: Brighton
brighton.description: Commecha Station, ultra-elite rec station for the uber wealthy. Closest to Supermassive Black Hole, between Nimbus and Verdessa.

nimbus.name: Nimbus
nimbus.description: Closest to Grupp, between Supermassive Black Hole and Sapphire Fields.

verdessa.name: Verdessa
verdessa.description: Closest to Smelt Worlds, between Sublex and Gas-N-Gripe 12.

celebros.name: Celebros
celebros.description: Closest to Brighton, between Verdessa and Mornell.

sublex.name: Sublex
sublex.description: Closest to Smelt Worlds, between Verdessa and Flipsulon.

propheta.name: Propheta
propheta.description: Executive Suite - a small ultra urban planet where the Board administration is housed. Closest to Cerulean Plains, rimward of Tuskan.

flipsulon.name: Flipsulon
flipsulon.description: Between Sapphire Fields and Smelt Worlds.

nj12.name: NJ12
nj12.description: Closest to Cerulean Plains, spinward of Walprug.

walpurg.name: Walpurg
walpurg.description: Closest to First Galactic War Ruin Zone, spinward of Coward's Crossing.

mercgolia.name: Mercgolia
mercgolia.description: Rimward of Padania, spinward of Kipple.

dunroid.name: Dunroid
dunroid.description: Between Vopva and Plopidor. Closest Gas-N-Gripe 16.

wodden.name: Wodden
wodden.description: Multiple massive stations in orbit around high-resource planets. Rimward of Propheta, spinward of Fonox.

ivutlis.name: Ivutlis
ivutlis.description: Between Halcyon, Durury, and the Hungry Sun.

caronia.name: Caronia
caronia.description: Closest to Rho Bees, between Rho Bees and Phytos.

rho-bees.name: Rho Bees
rho-bees.notes: Planetary territory in contention between independent X-faction and NGC. Active conflict zone.

durury.name: Durury
durury.description: Neotypian: brown dwarf, with 7 orbiting moons. Closest to Bruminax, spinward of Padania.

bruminax.name: Bruminax
bruminax.description: Between Halcyon and Durury, rimward of Coward's Crossing.

alfpas.name: Alfpas
alfpas.description: Closest to Rho Bees, between Rho Bees and Gas-N-Gripe 5.

steepborto.name: Steepborto
steepborto.description: Closest to Gantropic, between Gantropic and Comoda.

fonox.name: Fonox
fonox.description: Between Wodden and Gas-N-Gripe 14, rimward of NJ12.

vamburdia-lesser.name: Vamburdia Lesser
vamburdia-lesser.description: Between Los Kuaran and Vamburdia Greater.

vopva.name: Vopva
vopva.description: Coreward of Dunroid, closest to Sapphire Fields.
vopva.notes: Equal share of system between the big 3.

gantropic.name: Gantropic
gantropic.description: Closest to Steepborto, rimward of Halcyon.

the-hungry-sun.name: The Hungry Sun
the-hungry-sun.description: Closest to Ivutlis, rimward of Halcyon.
the-hungry-sun.notes: Orbital destablization leading to planetary destruction underway.

ligroman.name: Ligroman
ligroman.description: Closest to the Hungry Sun, between Ivutlis and Sunurdan.

homi-eaomi.name: Homi Eaomi
homi-eaomi.description: Closest to Comoda, spinward of Majestlon.

majestlon.name: Majestlon
majestlon.description: Closest to Homi Eaomi, rimward of Steepborto.

halcyon.name: Halcyon
halcyon.description: Closest to Gantropic, spinward of Bruminax.

amary.name: Amary
amary.description: Being devoured by The Hungry Sun.

osminok.name: Osminok
osminok.description: K5V orange dwarf. Gaby's homeworld system. Far outer rim, galactic halo region.
osminok.notes: 0.7 solar masses, 0.3 solar luminosities, ~6 billion years old. 20-40 billion year lifespan.

osminok-i.name: Little Shadow
osminok-i.description: The Persistent Little Shadow That Chases The Light And Avoids Our Gaze. Tidally locked rocky world baked on one side, frozen on the other. Geometric scars matching Tsunari's. Ancient automated mining infrastructure sits dormant.
osminok-i.notes: 0.6 Earth masses, 0.25 AU. Day side 450C, night side -180C. Depleted resource zone.

osminok-prime.name: Osminok Prime
osminok-prime.description: Ocean Home. 99%+ ocean coverage, perpetual planetary megastorms. Homeworld of the Osminoki.
osminok-prime.notes: 0.9 Earth radii, 1.15g, 0.55 AU, 180-day orbit, 18-hour day, 35 deg axial tilt, 2.5 bar atmosphere.

tsunari.name: Tsunari
tsunari.description: Waving Sister. Massive moon with geometric surface scars of unknown origin. Dark basaltic plains, heavily cratered, pulverized regolith.
tsunari.notes: 0.3 Earth masses (25x Luna), ~180,000 km orbit, ~8 malton unit period. No atmosphere, no magnetic field.

osminok-iii.name: Red Wanderer
osminok-iii.description: The Wanderer Of Red And Orange Whose Calls Still Echo In The Black. Failed gas giant with thick nitrogen-methane atmosphere, reddish-orange from iron oxide aerosols. Nine moons. Upper atmosphere stripped of hydrogen-helium by unknown means.
osminok-iii.notes: 4 Earth masses, 1.8 AU, 50+ bar, 11-hour rotation. 9 moons (8 captured asteroids + 1 icy body 0.1 Earth masses).

osminok-iv.name: Blue Watcher
osminok-iv.description: The Bright Blue Eye That Watches Us Fondly From A Great Distance. Ice giant with brilliant blue-white methane atmosphere and spectacular natural ice rings. 23 known moons, several with cryovolcanism. Brightest object in Osminok's night sky after Tsunari.
osminok-iv.notes: 14 Earth masses, 3.5 AU. Ice rings span 160,000 km, formed ~100M years ago from a tidally disrupted moon.

osminok-v.name: Ossuary
osminok-v.description: Hidden Rock. Small cold dwarf planet on a highly elliptical orbit, invisible from Osminok Prime. Coloration of sun-bleached bones.
osminok-v.notes: 0.08 Earth masses, 8 AU. Known only from galactic survey data and Starsinger flight records.

osminok-vi.name: Silent Stone
osminok-vi.description: A small, ancient, pristine world drifting at the far edge of the Outer Dark. Appears to have never been touched by anything or anyone.
osminok-vi.notes: 45 AU. The Osminoki have begun planning an expedition.

inebrax-station.name: Inebrax Station
inebrax-station.description: Where the player crew is currently docked. In the Homi Eaomi system.
